Why Kifaru

BUILT DIFFERENT.
BUILT STRONGER.

📡

Hotspot Everywhere

Connect from anywhere our signal reaches. No setup, no installation — just find Kifaru WiFi and you're in.

⚡

Blazing Speeds

Up to 100 Mbps on premium plans. Stream, game, and video call simultaneously without skipping a beat.

🛡️

Always Improving

70% uptime and climbing. Redundant infrastructure and weekly hardware upgrades keep the network stronger every day.

💳

Instant M-Pesa

Pay and go live in under 30 seconds. No bank cards, no apps — just your phone and M-Pesa.

🕐

24/7 Live Support

Our team never sleeps. Chat, WhatsApp, or call any time — so your connection doesn't have to stop either.

🌍

Expanding Coverage

Kihunguro is dense with coverage. Githurai 45 is charging up. New zones launching every single week.

How It Works

CONNECTED IN 60 SECONDS

No technician. No waiting. Just M-Pesa and you're live.

📡

Find Kifaru WiFi

Spot "Kifaru WiFi" in your device's network list across our hotspot zones.

📦

Choose a Plan

From 1.5 hours to a full month — your pace, your budget, your choice.

💳

Pay via M-Pesa

Enter your phone, confirm the push notification. Done in 30 seconds.

🚀

Charge Forward!

You're live instantly. Stream, work, game — the rhino has your back.

FAQ

QUESTIONS? ANSWERED.

How do I find a Kifaru hotspot?▼
Look for "Kifaru WiFi" in your WiFi list. Active in Kihunguro (17+ hotspots, dense) and Githurai 45 (6+ hotspots, growing). Strong signal throughout those areas.
How fast is Kifaru WiFi?▼
Entry plans: 10–15 Mbps. Daily Charge: 30 Mbps. Weekly: 50 Mbps. Monthly Beast: up to 100 Mbps — enough for 4K on multiple devices.
What if my plan expires?▼
Session pauses automatically. Return to the portal, pick a new plan, pay via M-Pesa and you reconnect instantly — no need to re-enter device details.
Paid but no connection — what do I do?▼
Use our Reconnect tool on the login page. Enter your M-Pesa transaction code from the SMS (eg. QAH9QWWZRR) — restores in seconds. Still stuck? Call 0734 349 600.
Is there a data cap on unlimited plans?▼
No hard caps. Fair-use policy — standard household and business use is always unrestricted. We never secretly throttle your speed.
What areas have coverage?▼
Active in Kihunguro (17+ hotspots) and Githurai 45 (6+ and expanding). Coming soon: Kasarani, Roysambu, Ruaraka. Chat us to check your exact area!
